extDescription.message: Enhance your GitHub dev workflow. Open any file directly in your local IDE with a single click.

hintBasePath.message: Parent folder where your repositories are cloned

errorEmptyPath.message: Please enter the workspace base path.

errorInvalidPath.message: Path must be an absolute path starting with /.

footerHint.message: Look for the "Open in IDE" button in GitHub file views.

tooltipUnconfigured.message: GitHub Dev Toolkit: Please set your base path and IDE in the extension popup.
